source.name: CA AG Charity Registry + IRS 990 (via ProPublica)
source.license: Public record (CA DOJ); 990s are public IRS records

cadence: AG registry updated 1st & 3rd Wednesday monthly; 990 data lags 12-18 months
caveats: Matching is by normalized organization name — a published match rate, not a guarantee; unmatched entities may still be registered under a different legal name.
'May not operate' status means the AG registry lists the charity as delinquent, suspended, or revoked — it is a compliance flag, not a fraud finding.
990 figures lag 12-18 months behind reality and cover the organization's whole operation, not its California government revenue.
